Afghanistan.notes: e-Visa: Visitors must arrive at Kabul International (KBL)..

Albania.notes: Visitors can enter with a multiple entry C or D visas issued by a Schengen Member State, if they used the visa to enter the Schengen Area at least once, or multiple entry visa issued by the United Kingdom or the USA if they have already used the visa to enter the country of issue at least once for a maximum of 90 days.. Visitors can obtain an e-visa before departure at https://e-visa.al. They must have a printed e-visa confirmation which can be verified by the SQsign App by scanning its QR code..

Algeria.notes: Application for a tourist visa to Algeria must be accompanied either by a certificate of accommodation.. Persons may be denied entry if entering with a passport containing visas or stamps issued by Israel.. Visitors on tours organized to some southern regions by an approved travel agency may obtain a visa on arrival for up to 30 days..

Andorra.notes: Although no visa requirements exist, apply the relevant regulations of France or Spain, whichever must be transited to reach Andorra..

Australia.notes: May apply online (Online Visitor e600 visa)..

Azerbaijan.notes: Who are of Armenian descent Government of Azerbaijan bans the entry..

Bahamas.notes: US$100 for a single-entry visa or US$110 for multiply entry..

Bahrain.notes: Those with a visa issued by USA, United Kingdom, a Schengen Member State, Saudi Arabia or United Arab Emirates can obtain a visa on arrival for a maximum stay of 1 month. They can apply to extend their stay for an additional 2 weeks..

Belize.notes: No visa required for holders of a valid multiple entry visa or Permanent Residence Card from the US, multiple entry Schengen visa, multiple entry visa or Permanent Residence Card from Canada..

Benin.notes: Must have an international vaccination certificate.. Three types of electronic visa are offered: the e-Visa valid for 30 days for a single entry (50 EUR), the e-Visa valid for 30 days for several (multiple) entries (75 EUR), and the e-Visa valid for 90 days to make several (multiple) entries (100 EUR)..

Bhutan.notes: The Sustainable Development Fee (SDF) of 200 USD per person, per night for almost all visitors to Bhutan. Additionally, if payment is made in US dollars from September 1, 2023 to August 31, 2027, the SDF is 100 USD..

Bosnia and Herzegovina.notes: No visa required for holders of multiple-entry visa issued by Cyprus, Ireland, Monaco, USA or a Schengen Member State for a maximum stay of 30 days. A total of 90 days is granted within 6 months..

China.notes: Visa-free for 30 days, for a maximum total stay of 90 days within any 1 calendar year..

Comoros.notes: Nationals of any country can obtain a visa on arrival for a maximum stay of 45 days..

Côte d'Ivoire.notes: e-Visa holders must arrive via Port Bouet Airport..

Egypt.notes: Visa on arrival is available in any land, air or sea port of entry for 30 USD, or e-Visa is available..

Ethiopia.notes: Visa on arrival is obtainable only at Addis Ababa Bole International Airport.. e-Visa holders must arrive via Addis Ababa Bole International Airport.. e-Visa is available for 30 or 90 days..

Gabon.notes: e-Visa holders must arrive via Libreville International Airport..

Grenada.notes: A pre-clearance letter issued by Grenada required for visa on arrival..

Guatemala.notes: Visa-free for a maximum stay of 90 days for holders of a valid visa issued by Canada, USA or a Schengen Member State..

India.notes: e-Visa holders must arrive via 32 designated airports or 5 designated seaports.. An Indian e-Tourist Visa may only be obtained twice within 1 calendar year.. Foreigners of Pakistani origin or who hold a Pakistani Passport are not eligible for an e-Visa. Foreigners who are not Pakistani nationals, but whose parents or grandparents (either paternal or maternal) were born in, or were permanent residents in Pakistan, are also not eligible for an e-Visa..

Ireland.notes: Visa waiver for UK 'C' visa holders until October 2026. Entry permitted only if first point of entry to the Common Travel Area is in the UK...

Jamaica.notes: Visa waived for holders of a visa issued by Canada, USA, United Kingdom or a Schengen Member State, valid for the period of intended stay. They must travel as tourists for a maximum stay of 30 days. They must also have a vaccination certificate for Measles, Polio and Rubella..

Jordan.notes: Visa can be obtained upon arrival, it will cost a total of 40 JOD, obtainable at most international ports of entry and land border crossings. (except King Hussein/Allenby Bridge ).

Kenya.notes: Applications can be submitted up to 90 days prior to travel and must be submitted at least 3 days in advance.. eTA fee is 32.50 USD.. Proof of reservation at the hotel where visitors plan to stay is required (if staying with friends, an invitation letter is also acceptable).. Yellow fever vaccination certificate is required if coming from endemic countries.. Can also be entered on an East Africa tourist visa issued by Rwanda or Uganda..

South Korea.notes: Visa-free access for 30 days to Jeju Island..

Laos.notes: 18 of the 33 border crossings are only open to regular visa holders.. e-Visa may be used to enter Laos through the Luang Prabang, Pakse and Vientiane international airports, 3 Thai-Lao Friendship Bridges, in Boten (road and railroad ), and in Vientiane (at Khamsavath railway station ).. Visa on arrival is available at the Luang Prabang, Pakse and Vientiane international airports, 4 Thai-Lao Friendship Bridges and 7 border crossings..

Lebanon.notes: Extendable for 2 additional months.. Granted free of charge at Beirut International Airport or any other port of entry if there is no Israeli visa or seal, holding a telephone number, an address in Lebanon, and a non refundable return or circle trip ticket..

Madagascar.notes: For stays of 61 to 90 days, the visa fee is 59 USD..

Mauritania.notes: Visitors can obtain an e-Visa before departure at https://anrpts.gov.mr/visa/requestvisa. They must have a printed e-visa confirmation..

Mexico.notes: Passengers can enter with a multiple-entry visa issued by Canada, Japan, United Kingdom, USA or a Schengen Member State for a maximum of 180 days. An extended visa issued by the USA is not accepted..

Morocco.notes: e-Visa is available for holders of residence permit or non-electronic visas of Schengen countries, the United States, Australia, Canada, the United Kingdom, Ireland, and New Zealand, with multiple entries and that are valid for at least 90 days as of the date of submission of the e-Visa application..

Myanmar.notes: e-Visa holders must arrive via Yangon, Nay Pyi Taw or Mandalay airports or via land border crossings with Thailand — Tachileik, Myawaddy and Kawthaung or India — Rih Khaw Dar and Tamu.. e-Visa is available for tourism only..

Nauru.notes: Visa applications are made by emailing the Nauru Immigration with necessary details. Visa cost is 50 USD..

Nepal.notes: 15 Days - 30 USD?, 30 Days - 50 USD, 90 Days - 125 USD..

North Macedonia.notes: Visitors May enter without a visa if they are entering North Macedonia as a tourist and have a "tourist voucher" or are in a travel group organised by travel agencies.. In addition, visitors may enter without a visa if they possess an invitation letter from an individual or a medical institution.. Visa not required for whose with a multiple entry visa issued by Canada, USA or United Kingdom or a multiple entry Schengen C visa. The visa must be valid for at least 5 days beyond the period of intended stay. They are visa exempt for a maximum stay of 15 days. A total of 90 days is granted within 6 months..

Papua New Guinea.notes: Visitors may apply for a visa online under the "Tourist - Own Itinerary" category..

Philippines.notes: Passengers can obtain an e-visa before departure at https://evisa.gov.ph. This only applies to residents of the United Arab Emirates who hold valid Emirati residence visas..

Qatar.notes: Visitors travelling as tourists or on business can obtain a visa upon arrival for a maximum of 30 days. They must have a return ticket; and at least 1,000 USD - cash or a valid credit card; and a hotel reservation confirmation for the duration of stay in Qatar..

Saint Lucia.notes: Cruise ship passengers visiting for one day are exempted from obtaining visas..

Saudi Arabia.notes: Passengers with a tourist or business visa issued by the US, United Kingdom or a Schengen Member State can obtain a visa upon arrival for a maximum of 90 days in a period of 12 months if they travel as tourists. The visa must have been used at least once and must have an entry stamp of the issuing country. The visa fee must be paid by credit card..

Seychelles.notes: Passengers can obtain a "Visitor's Permit" upon arrival for a maximum of 3 months. They must have:. - a return/onward ticket; and - sufficient funds (minimum of US$150.- or equivalent per day); and - proof of accommodation for the duration of stay. Extension of stay possible for additional 3 months with a maximum stay of 12 months.

Singapore.notes: Visa-free for 96 hours in case of transit to/from 3rd countries.. Visa application can be submitted online using the 'e-Service' through a strategic partner or a local contact in Singapore..

South Sudan.notes: Obtainable online 30 days single entry for 100 USD, 90 days multiple entry for 200 USD and 180 days multiple entry for 350 USD.. Printed visa authorization must be presented at the time of travel..

Suriname.notes: An entrance fee of USD 50 or EUR 50 must be paid online prior to arrival.. Multiple entry e-Visa is also available..

Syria.notes: Visa on arrival for a maximum stay of 15 days..

Togo.notes: Visitors can obtain an e-visa before departure at https://voyage.gouv.tg. They must have a printed e-visa confirmation with a QR code...

Turkey.notes: For a maximum total stay of 90 days within 1 year..

Turkmenistan.notes: 10-day visa on arrival if holding a letter of invitation provided by a company registered in Turkmenistan with a prior approval from the Foreign Ministry. Visitors can apply to extend their stay for an additional 10 days.. When transiting between two non-bordering countries, visitors can obtain a Turkmenistan transit visa for a five-day stay. This must be applied for in advance at the Turkmenistan Embassy. Visitors must also submit copies of the visas for the country of entry into Turkmenistan and the country of departure from Turkmenistan. Visa fee is 20 USD..

Ukraine.notes: 90 days within any 180-day period. Entering Ukraine for Belarusian citizens is only allowed for women and male citizens under the age of 18 or older than 60..

Venezuela.notes: Extension of stay possible for additional 90 days..

Vietnam.notes: The total period of stay must not exceed 90 days within a calendar year.. A single entry e-Visa valid for 90 days is also available..

Yemen.notes: Yemen introduced an e-Visa system for visitors who meet certain eligibility requirements (group travel of 10 or more people, business trips, and transit etc.)..

Mount Athos.stay: Special permit required (4 days: 25 euro for Orthodox visitors, 35 euro for non-Orthodox visitors, 18 euro for students). There is a visitors' quota: maximum 100 Orthodox and 10 non-Orthodox per day and women are not allowed..

UN Buffer Zone in Cyprus.stay: Access Permit is required for travelling inside the zone, except Civil Use Areas..

Jan Mayen.stay: Permit issued by the local police required for staying for less than 24 hours and permit issued by the Norwegian police for staying for more than 24 hours..

Kosovo.stay: No visa required for holders of a multiple entry Schengen visa valid for the duration of stay. They can stay for a maximum of 15 days..

South Ossetia.stay: To enter South Ossetia, visitors must have a multiple-entry visa for Russia and register their stay with the Migration Service of the Ministry of Internal Affairs within 3 days..

Eritrea (outside Asmara ).stay: To travel in the rest of the country, a Travel Permit for Foreigners is required (20 Eritrean nakfa )

Ascension Island.stay: From May 2015, the Ascension Island Government does not issue entry visas including eVisas to nationals of Belarus.

Tristan da Cunha.stay: Permission to land required for 15/30 pounds sterling (yacht/ship passenger) for Tristan da Cunha Island or 20 pounds sterling for Gough Island, Inaccessible Island or Nightingale Islands.

Kish Island.stay: 14 days; Visitors to Kish Island do not require a visa.

Iraqi Kurdistan.stay: If the guarantor applies and pays, the visitors may apply for an e-Visa. e-Visa for 30 days is available at Erbil and Sulaymaniyah airports.

Palestine.stay: Arrival by sea to Gaza Strip not allowed.

Gorno-Badakhshan Autonomous Province.stay: OIVR permit required (15+5 Tajikistani Somoni ) and another special permit (free of charge) is required for Lake Sarez.

Pitcairn Islands.stay: 14 days visa-free and landing fee 35 USD or tax of 5 USD if not going ashore.

United States Minor Outlying Islands.stay: Special permits required for Baker Island, Howland Island, Jarvis Island, Johnston Atoll, Kingman Reef, Midway Atoll, Palmyra Atoll and Wake Island.

Galápagos.stay: 60 days; Visitors must pre-register to receive a 20 USD Transit Control Card (TCT)..

South Georgia and the South Sandwich Isl.stay: Pre-arrival permit from the Commissioner required (72 hours/1 month for 110/160 pounds sterling )..

Antarctica.stay: Special permits required for British Antarctic Territory, French Southern and Antarctic Lands, Argentine Antarctica, Australian Antarctic Territory, Chilean Antarctic Territory, Heard Island and McDonald Islands, Peter I Island, Queen Maud Land, Ross Dependency..

Albania.notes: Visitors can enter with a multiple entry C or D visas issued by a Schengen Member State, if they used the visa to enter the Schengen Area at least once, or multiple entry visa issued by the United Kingdom or the USA if they have already used the visa to enter the country of issue at least once for a maximum of 90 days.. Visitors can obtain an e-visa before departure at https://e-visa.al. They must have a printed e-visa confirmation which can be verified by the SQsign App by scanning its QR code..

Bahrain.notes: Those with a visa issued by USA, United Kingdom, a Schengen Member State, Saudi Arabia or United Arab Emirates can obtain a visa on arrival for a maximum stay of 1 month. They can apply to extend their stay for an additional 2 weeks..

Belize.notes: No visa required for holders of a valid multiple entry visa or Permanent Residence Card from the US, multiple entry Schengen visa, multiple entry visa or Permanent Residence Card from Canada..

Bosnia and Herzegovina.notes: No visa required for holders of multiple-entry visa issued by Cyprus, Ireland, Monaco, USA or a Schengen Member State for a maximum stay of 30 days. A total of 90 days is granted within 6 months..

Guatemala.notes: Visa-free for a maximum stay of 90 days for holders of a valid visa issued by Canada, USA or a Schengen Member State..

Jamaica.notes: Visa waived for holders of a visa issued by Canada, USA, United Kingdom or a Schengen Member State, valid for the period of intended stay. They must travel as tourists for a maximum stay of 30 days. They must also have a vaccination certificate for Measles, Polio and Rubella..

Mexico.notes: Passengers can enter with a multiple-entry visa issued by Canada, Japan, United Kingdom, USA or a Schengen Member State for a maximum of 180 days. An extended visa issued by the USA is not accepted..

Saudi Arabia.notes: Passengers with a tourist or business visa issued by the US, United Kingdom or a Schengen Member State can obtain a visa upon arrival for a maximum of 90 days in a period of 12 months if they travel as tourists. The visa must have been used at least once and must have an entry stamp of the issuing country. The visa fee must be paid by credit card..
